creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vladislav Shabanov from comment #23)
I didn't ask you to physically disable the BMC, the new FreeBSD version (14.2) has additional counters that will tell us if it is riding on one of the ports.  sysctl dev.igb.<x> will do.

I am not aware of any instability of x2apic.  I wouldn't think it relevant to the problems you are having on or off.
